name_en: [Original Leather] This classic Stark backpack features the iconic Visetos pattern and Nappa leather, a pioneer in the daily luxury field. Multi-faceted rivets outline the silhouette of the bag, embodying MCM's unique rebellious spirit. The bag features an outer pocket, a front zip pocket, and an internal compartment for tablets and small electronics, showcasing modern functionality that complements its contemporary look. Size: Actual photo small approx 13.0 x 26.0 x 33.0 cm; Medium approx 33.5 x 42.5 x 16.0 cm
